name: Rude's Cayenne Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned pumpkin (or 2 cups fresh, cooked, pureed, drained)
2 tsp Cayenne pepper (freshly ground from dried pods is best)
2 tbsp Pecans (ground to a fine flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit before measuring the ingredients.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine all the filling ingredients and beat them together until smooth. Pour the mixture into a crust-lined 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for another 35 minutes or until set.
4. Cool and serve topped with whipped cream.
Notes:
This is deceptively hot, so make it once with these amounts and adjust from there if not hot enough. Make sure you have the whipped cream on hand to cool the heat if it is too intense.
